forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 38. Southwest wind around 7 mph.

forecast.name: Monday
forecast.detailedForecast: Sunny, with a high near 67. Southwest wind 6 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph.

weather_report:
As the sun slips below the horizon, Boston finds itself under a blanket of stillness, the evening air tinged with a gentle chill as temperatures settle around thirty-eight degrees. The southwest wind meanders softly at seven miles per hour, creating a whisper among the emerging stars. Tonight holds the promise of a partly cloudy sky, with just enough breaks to let the moonlight cast fleeting shadows across the familiar contours of the city. A sense of calm blankets the landscape, inviting those who venture out to don a light jacket to embrace the cool embrace of the night.

As dawn approaches on Monday, expect the world to awaken in a symphony of warmth and luminosity, with clear skies offering a sunny respite that will lead to a high near sixty-seven. The gentle rustle of the wind will carry the crisp scent of spring, mingling with the earthy aroma of melting frost. A leisurely stroll through the neighborhood, perhaps stopping for a coffee at a local café with a patio, could provide one with the perfect way to appreciate the transition from coolness to warmth. Light layers will serve well throughout the day, allowing you to bask in the sunshine while remaining comfortable as the day unfolds. So, whether you find yourself wandering through the parks or absorbing the vibrant energy of the city streets, the day promises a delightful touch of spring’s approach.
